examples: As adjutant I was responsible for his day-to-day programme.
The Adjutant informs you whenever 30 seconds of daylight remain.
He was followed by an adjutant and the paymaster of the regiment.
So how was it that he became adjutant, the second in command of a secret army, asked Mr Clarke?
In February 1974, Denis Brennan in the Adjutant General's office said the way the Army recorded colour was "complex".
